name: PATENT_PUBLICATIONS_FOR_NEW_ENTRANTS_2024
description: Patent publications for new entrants in 2024. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (a:Assignee)<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p0:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y0:Year)
WITH a, min(y0.year) AS first_year
WHERE first_year = $year
MATCH (a)<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WHERE y.year = $year
RETURN a.name AS assignee, p.pub_no AS patent_publication, y.year AS year
ORDER BY assignee, patent_publication
LIMIT 100

examples: What patent publication numbers were disclosed by those 2024 new entrants?
For the companies that newly entered in 2024, what patent publication numbers can be identified?
Which patent publications are associated with those 2024 first-time entrants?
